# Dev Log: Plan19 Service Injection - Code Fix Rework

- Date: 2026-02-12
- Cycle: 20260211_cycle22
- Agent: dev-core
- Plan: Plan19 Service Injection
- SDK Interface Changed: YES \(added `has\(\)` method\)
- Status: BUILD_PASS, TESTS_PASS \(pre-existing test failure in plugin-dependencies.e2e.test.ts unrelated to changes\)

## Changes Made

### 1. Added `has\(\)` method to IServiceRegistry interface
- File: `/data/openstarry_eco/agent_dev/openstarry/packages/sdk/src/types/service.ts:43-48`
- Added `has\(name: string\): boolean` method to interface
- Provides existence check before retrieval

### 2. Implemented `has\(\)` method in ServiceRegistry class  
- File: `/data/openstarry_eco/agent_dev/openstarry/packages/core/src/infrastructure/service-registry.ts:49-56`
- Implementation: `has\(name: string\): boolean { return this.services.has\(name\); }`
- Simple delegation to internal Map

### 3. Added tests for `has\(\)` method
- File: `/data/openstarry_eco/agent_dev/openstarry/packages/core/__tests__/infrastructure/service-registry.test.ts:94-105`
- Test 1: `has\(\)` returns true for registered service
- Test 2: `has\(\)` returns false for non-existent service
- Total service-registry tests: 19 \(all passing\)

### 4. Verified AgentCore exports serviceRegistry
- File: `/data/openstarry_eco/agent_dev/openstarry/packages/core/src/agents/agent-core.ts:67`
- Already exposed as `readonly serviceRegistry: IServiceRegistry` in AgentCore interface
- Implementation returns it correctly on line 240
- No changes needed

## Notes

### Spec Addendum Compliance
All code fixes fully comply with the approved Spec Addendum:
1. `IServiceRegistry` pattern with `ctx.services` - IMPLEMENTED
2. `has\(\)` method - ADDED as requested
3. Field names \(`services`, `serviceDependencies`\) - CORRECT as-is
4. `serviceRegistry` export in AgentCore - VERIFIED \(already present\)

### Pre-existing Test Failure
The `plugin-dependencies.e2e.test.ts` failure is NOT caused by our changes:
- Root cause: Missing `/packages/core/src/sandbox/plugin-worker-runner.js` \(build artifact\)
- The `.ts` source file exists but compiled `.js` is missing
- Affects sandbox worker creation in e2e tests
- Tests try to spawn sandboxed plugins, fail on worker file not found
- This is a build/compilation issue unrelated to service registry changes

### Total LOC Changed
- Interface: 7 lines added \(documentation + signature\)
- Implementation: 8 lines added \(documentation + method body\)
- Tests: 11 lines added \(2 test cases with descriptions\)
- **Total: 26 lines \(under 30 LOC as expected\)**
